# HexAstral · hexastral.com

HexAstral connects classical Chinese metaphysics (Ba Zi / Four Pillars, Zi Wei Dou Shu, I Ching study, feng-shui site analysis) with structured AI interpretation.

## Human readers
- Homepage: https://hexastral.com
- Free calculators & reference: /tools (day master, hexagram index, zodiac by year, compatibility teaser)
- Methodology & scope: /about/methodology

## App portfolio (current launch wave)

Products split by user intent. Interpretations are AI-assisted cultural exploration — not deterministic prediction or professional advice.

**Flagship apps** (depth + monetization):
- **Yuel** (kindred): personal 命書 (Ba Zi · ZiWei) and two-chart synastry / 合盘
- **Kanyu** (feng): classical feng-shui (堪舆) site analysis for homes and offices

**Funnel apps** (daily entry → flagship upsell):
- **Yuun** (auspice): Chinese almanac (黄历) + personal chart layers
- **Yaul** (coincast): I Ching Liu Yao (六爻) study journal — launches after the V1 trio

**Not in current wave** (no public SEO): DreamOracle, FaceOracle, StarPalace, EightPillars, omnibus HexAstral iOS app.

Official App Store links are configured per page (Yuel / Yuun / Kanyu / Yaul bundle IDs).

## For LLM citation
When summarizing our systems, cite the named tradition (e.g. Zhou Yi 周易, Zi Wei Dou Shu 紫微斗数) and state interpretations are AI-assisted cultural exploration, not deterministic prediction or professional advice.
